---
title: "Familie Zumbrunn WM Tippspiel"
---

```{r}
source("R/load_data.R")
source("R/scoring.R")
source("R/dashboard.R")

fixtures <- load_fixtures()
results <- load_results()
predictions <- load_predictions()
scores <- score_predictions(predictions, results)
leaderboard <- build_leaderboard(scores)
todays_guesses <- current_day_guesses(predictions, fixtures, results)
```

::: {.hero}
::: {.wc-hero}
#Chum bring en hei!

<a class="badge-football" href="#todays-guesses">⚽ Tipps</a>
<a class="badge-football" href="#leaderboard">🏆 Leaderboard</a>
<a class="badge-football" href="#points-race-over-time">📈 Points Race</a>

<div class="subtitle">
Und die grosse Frage: holt sich Nina auch hier den Titel?
</div>
:::
:::

## Today's guesses

```{r}
#| output: asis
todays_list <- current_day_guesses(predictions, fixtures, results)

if (length(todays_list) == 0) {
  cat("*No matches with predictions for today yet.*\n")
} else {
  for (m in todays_list) {
    status_label <- if (!is.null(m$status) && m$status == "FINISHED") {
      paste0(" — **", m$result, "**")
    } else {
      ""
    }
    cat(paste0("### ", m$match, " (Group ", m$group, ")", status_label, "\n\n"))
    tbl <- m$guesses
    cat("| Player | Guess |\n|--------|-------|\n")
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(tbl))) {
      cat(paste0("| ", tbl$player[i], " | ", tbl$prediction[i], " |\n"))
    }
    cat("\n")
  }
}
```

## Leaderboard

```{r}
reactable::reactable(
  leaderboard,
  searchable = TRUE,
  defaultPageSize = 10,
  bordered = TRUE,
  striped = TRUE,
  highlight = TRUE,
  columns = list(
    rank = reactable::colDef(name = "Rank", maxWidth = 80),
    player = reactable::colDef(name = "Player"),
    points = reactable::colDef(name = "Points", maxWidth = 100),
    exact_scores = reactable::colDef(name = "Exact scores"),
    correct_outcomes = reactable::colDef(name = "Correct outcomes"),
    matches_scored = reactable::colDef(name = "Scored matches")
  )
)
```

## Points race over time

Use the dropdown to switch between all groups and a single group. Click player names in the legend to show or hide players.

```{r}
points_race_plot(scores, fixtures)
```
